steps.action: Run pytest -k 'TestNullCoercion and not NewFields' (10 tests covering required string fields with null → "")
steps.expected: All 10 tests pass: provision rule, then, title, definition term/definition, formula unit, and nullable fields left unchanged

steps.action: Run pytest -k 'TestNullCoercionNewFields' (18 tests covering additional required string fields)
steps.expected: All 18 tests pass: source.standard, source.section, metadata.extracted_by, metadata.qc_status, formula expression, reference target, axis/curve fields, skipped_figure fields
steps.observed: 18 passed, 0 failed (as part of 34-test combined run)

steps.action: Run inline Python: post_process element with data.rule=null, verify result
steps.observed: data.rule after post_process: '' — confirmed empty string

evidence.keyResults: TestNullCoercion: 10 passed. TestNullCoercionNewFields: 18 passed (source.standard, source.section, metadata.extracted_by, metadata.qc_status, formula expression, reference target, axis name/unit/scale, curve label/interpolation, skipped_figure figure_type/skip_reason). Nullable fields (description, qc_notes, page) confirmed NOT coerced.

steps.action: Run pytest test_provision_rule_null: provision with data.rule=null
Run inline Python: create provision with data={'rule': None, ...}, call post_process

steps.expected: Nested data.term and data.definition coerced to ''

evidence.keyResults: test_provision_rule_null: PASSED. Inline Python confirms data.rule null→'' coercion. test_definition_term_null: PASSED. test_definition_definition_null: PASSED.

assertions.title: Range fields with null values removed

steps.action: Run inline Python: post_process with range=null and range=[null,100]
steps.expected: 'range' key absent in output parameter dicts
steps.observed: range key present: False for both cases. Parameter dict: {"unit": "ft"}

evidence.inlineVerification: range:null → param dict {"unit":"ft"} (no range key). range:[null,100] → param dict {"unit":"ft"} (no range key).
evidence.keyResults: All 4 null-range test cases PASSED. test_range_null_removed, test_range_partial_null_removed, test_range_first_element_null_removed, test_second_element_null_removed.

steps.expected: range key present and value unchanged [0, 1500]

steps.action: Run pytest TestRangeNullRemoval::test_no_range_key_no_error (no range key at all)
steps.expected: No error, no range key added

steps.action: Run inline Python: post_process with range=[0,1500]
steps.expected: range key present: True, range value: [0, 1500]
steps.observed: range key present: True, range value: [0, 1500], unchanged: True

evidence.inlineVerification: range:[0,1500] → range key present: True, value: [0, 1500], unchanged: True
evidence.keyResults: test_valid_range_preserved: PASSED. test_no_range_key_no_error: PASSED. Inline verification confirms [0, 1500] preserved exactly.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed, 0 failed. VAL-PP-006 (null→empty string coercion for required string fields) confirmed by 28 pytest tests covering all schema-required string fields. VAL-PP-007 (nested data.rule null coercion) confirmed by pytest and inline verification. VAL-PP-008 (null range removal) confirmed by 4 test cases covering range:null, [null,100], [null,null], [0,null]. VAL-PP-009 (valid range preservation) confirmed by pytest and inline verification with [0,1500].
